title: Weathering Behavior
description: Schema for a weathering behavior record. Captures material degradation response to environmental exposure types including UV, thermal cycling, moisture, and freeze-thaw.

behavior_id.description: Unique identifier for this weathering behavior record.

material_ref.description: Reference to the parent material ID.

degradation_rate.description: Published degradation rate or severity (e.g., '85% tensile retention after 10,000 hours xenon arc').

test_method_ref.description: Reference to the weathering test standard (e.g., ASTM G154, ASTM G155).

service_life_impact.description: Published effect on expected service life.

climate_context.description: Climate context for this weathering record.
